items.title: Trump announces new tariffs on generic drugs to take effect in 2028 – US politics live
items.summary: President says 100% tariff would be imposed on generic drugs made overseas after 1 August 2028 ‘for a one year period of time, and 200% thereafter’ Sign up for US Breaking News...
